name_en: Grey and Milky White in stock!!️
name_cn:
Grey and Milky White in stock!!️
Original factory lining with cashmere✔️The Lady Diana that friends have been longing for is finally available in 4 compartments❤️. This size is between the 3-compartment and 5-compartment versions, practical and exquisite😌. It stands out when worn, elegant or casual, the best choice for various looks👏🏻
size:20cm
